ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle (Service Name)
ToolboxElements.Description: Standard Oracle connection string using TCP and service name.

ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle (SID)
ToolboxElements.Description: Oracle connection string using SID instead of service name.

ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL (Integrated Security)
ToolboxElements.Description: Microsoft SQL Server connection using Windows authentication.

ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL (SQL Authentication)
ToolboxElements.Description: Microsoft SQL Server connection using SQL Server authentication.

ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL (Trusted Connection with Instance)
ToolboxElements.Description: SQL Server connection using a specific named instance and trusted connection.

ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL (With Connection Pooling)
ToolboxElements.Description: SQL Server connection with enabled connection pooling.

ToolboxElements.Name: MySQL (Standard)
ToolboxElements.Description: Standard MySQL connection string with port, database and user credentials.

ToolboxElements.Name: MySQL (Pooling)
ToolboxElements.Description: MySQL connection with connection pooling enabled.

ToolboxElements.Name: PostgreSQL (Standard)
ToolboxElements.Description: PostgreSQL connection string using username and password authentication.

ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite (File Database)
ToolboxElements.Description: SQLite connection using a local file path.

ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite (In-Memory)
ToolboxElements.Description: SQLite in-memory database (non-persistent, useful for testing).

ToolboxElements.Name: SQLite (Shared Cache)
ToolboxElements.Description: SQLite connection with shared cache mode.
